description: Day 1-2 vendor manifest. See docs/DATA-PLAN.md §1 (source manifest) and §8 (build sequence). Each entry MUST be a public source with a stable URL. SHA-256 of the downloaded artifact is captured at fetch time and recorded in data/sources/README.md.

sources.title: AFME Post Trade Due Diligence Questionnaire (custodian) 2026
sources.license: free for all; AFME encourages widest usage
sources.version_note: DATA-PLAN §1 lists 2024 version; AFME has refreshed to 2026 (current as of 2026-05). Drift recorded in README.

sources.title: AFME-Irish Funds Prime Brokerage Due Diligence Questionnaire 2026
sources.license: free for all; AFME encourages widest usage
sources.note: Beyond DATA-PLAN §1 scope; included because plan calls out custodian-adjacent products and prime brokerage is one. Optional.

sources.title: AFME Recommended ESG Disclosure and Diligence Practices for the European High Yield Market — Jan 2026
sources.license: free for all; AFME encourages widest usage
sources.version_note: DATA-PLAN §1 expects a standalone 'AFME ESG DDQ'. AFME has consolidated ESG content under HY Disclosure Guidelines as of 2026; closest substitute. SME review needed before using as canon.esg.* seed.

sources.title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 — OSCAL JSON catalog

sources.note: This bundle is the gift per DATA-PLAN §1 — contains CAIQ JSON + CCM JSON/OSCAL. Verified via verify_sources.py.

sources.title: CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4.1 — main bundle (xlsx + companions)
sources.license: CSA license — free, redistribution permitted with attribution
sources.note: Contains CCM v4.1 xlsx, CAIQ v4.1 xlsx, and mapping spreadsheets to NIST/ISO/PCI/SOC2/CCPA/GDPR/AICPA TSC.
